Rationale: Absolute self-custody via private keys and UTXO model; no third-party seizure without key (whitepaper, protocol design).
Transaction inclusion via open fee market; miners prioritize by fee-per-byte (mempool dynamics).
Miners fully incentivized by block rewards and fees; rational self-interest secures network (Nakamoto 2008).
No taxation/redistribution; halving distributes new coins to miners rule-based, not centrally planned.
No protocol-level safety nets or recovery; full individual risk for loss/error.
Immutable rules and longest-chain enforcement ensure near-perfect replication across nodes.
Slow evolution via high-consensus BIPs/soft forks (SegWit, Taproot); designed resistance to frequent change.
99.98%+ uptime since 2009; survived bans, crashes, bugs via decentralized nodes.
High economic cost for attacks (>51% hashpower); some pool concentration noted but suppressed.
Global, permissionless mining race; difficulty adjustment maintains equilibrium.
Endured Mt. Gox, China ban, FTX, 80%+ drawdowns with uninterrupted protocol operation.
Catalyzed cryptocurrency class, Lightning, DeFi; reshaped fintech architecture.
Strict cryptographic validation; nodes reject invalid blocks/transactions automatically.
Nakamoto consensus resolves forks; bugs patched via coordinated upgrades (e.g., 2010 overflow).
PoW + full-node validation detects/suppresses invalid chains instantly and economically.
Base layer monolithic; emerging modularity via Lightning, sidechains, layers.
Append-only, replicated blockchain ledger across thousands of nodes.
Convergence around sound money ethos; maximalism present but no enforcement.
Strong focus on Austrian/censorship-resistance; alternatives marginalized socially.
Forks enable exit (e.g., BCH); social pressure exists but no forced suppression.
No constraints; multi-sig enables family structures at user discretion.
Protocol neutral; no belief/identity discrimination.
Ordinals allow arbitrary data/art inscription; permissionless.
Decentralized via BIPs, peer-reviewed crypto/game-theory research.
Voluntary resources; some directional advocacy but no compulsory doctrine.
Decentralized forums/social; influential outlets shape narratives but no central control.
No military; energy framed as 'digital defense' in discourse.
Neutral/opt-in; resists legacy integration, parallel system.
State debasement/attacks drive cohesion and upgrades.
Leaderless; succession via consensus and voluntary node choices.
Satoshi mythology present; anonymity prevents active hierarchy.
No formal purges; contentious forks expel views socially (Blocksize War).
Neutral; fixed supply unrelated to population policy.
Borderless value transfer; opposes capital controls.
Pseudonymous, identity-blind; only cryptographic validity matters.
